mapper.select: SELECT template_id, company_id, title, content, created_by, created_at FROM approval_template WHERE company_id = #{companyId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO approval_template (company_id, title, content, created_by, created_at) VALUES (#{companyId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{createdBy}, NOW())
mapper.select:
SELECT d.doc_id, d.company_id, d.template_id, t.title AS templateTitle, d.title, d.writer_id, d.writer_name, d.approver_id, d.approver_name, d.status, d.reject_reason, d.first_sign, d.created_at FROM approval_doc d LEFT JOIN approval_template t ON d.template_id = t.template_id WHERE d.company_id = #{companyId} AND d.is_deleted = 0
AND (d.writer_id = #{writerId} OR d.approver_id = #{writerId})
ORDER BY d.created_at DESC

SELECT d.doc_id, d.company_id, d.template_id, t.title AS templateTitle, d.title, d.content, d.writer_id, d.writer_name, d.approver_id, d.approver_name, d.status, d.reject_reason, d.first_sign, d.created_at FROM approval_doc d LEFT JOIN approval_template t ON d.template_id = t.template_id WHERE d.doc_id = #{docId} AND d.company_id = #{companyId} AND d.is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO approval_doc (company_id, template_id, title, content, writer_id, writer_name, approver_id, approver_name, status, created_at) VALUES (#{companyId}, #{templateId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{writerId}, #{writerName}, #{approverId}, #{approverName}, '대기', NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE approval_doc SET status = #{status}, approver_id = #{approverId}, approver_name= #{approverName}, reject_reason= #{rejectReason}, first_sign = CASE WHEN #{status} = '완료' THEN NOW() ELSE first_sign END WHERE doc_id = #{docId}
